title: Building an AI app: A low-code guide for small teams
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates how small teams can build AI applications using low-code development with Gemini, Cloud SQL, and AlloyDB for PostgreSQL. The approach enables natural language interfaces, hybrid search, and recommendations through auto-generated code without requiring deep AI expertise.
writeup: The video walks through how small teams can build AI applications with low-code development, using Gemini together with Cloud SQL and AlloyDB for PostgreSQL. It shows how spec-driven development and auto-generated code produce natural language interfaces, hybrid search, and recommendations without deep AI expertise. The takeaways center on combining vector search with a managed PostgreSQL backend and letting code generation handle the implementation, lowering the barrier for teams with limited resources.
